title: helictochloa adsurgens
intro: Helictochloa adsurgens, also known as the bent grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, Helictochloa adsurgens has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Helictochloa adsurgens are said to include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and promoting wound healing. Helictochloa adsurgens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional folk remedies to treat various ailments.
